note: MTM is project-wide, not subsystem-scoped. One instance per project. mtm_state.json is readable by all TMs so they can check for existing shared tools before building locally.

shared_tool_schema.note: Schema for objects in shared_tool_registry. Not a real entry.
shared_tool_schema.absorbed_from: string — tm_id or empty string if built by MTM directly
shared_tool_schema.stn_message_id: string — STN message_id of the shared_tool_notice

review_toolset_schema.note: Schema for Code Reviewer tools. Not a real entry.
review_toolset_schema.purpose: string — what review problem this tool solves

test_toolset_schema.note: Schema for Tester tools. Not a real entry.

absorption_candidate_schema.note: Schema for cross-subsystem tool candidates awaiting absorption decision. Not a real entry.

active_coverage_schema.note: Schema for active coverage sessions. Not a real entry.
active_coverage_schema.tools_built_during_coverage: array of tool_summary_object with fields: tool_name, tool_path, version, delivery_id (TDL message_id)

tm_registry_schema.note: Schema for known TMs. Not a real entry. Populated as TMs come online.

open_request_schema.note: Schema for tracked tool requests during coverage or direct build. Not a real entry.
